pregame_model_read.price_context: Initial board showed Strider 7+ at -112; entry improved to -108 before later buy price moved to -121.
pregame_model_read.pre_bet_thesis: Strider 7+ was below the projected median and under the max-pay threshold. Reds matchup supplied strikeout pockets while anti-burn protocol avoided the 8+/9+ ladder chase.

pitch_notes.four_seam_fastball: 49 pitches, 4 K, 95.8 mph avg, 33% CSW; primary volume and strikeout platform.
pitch_notes.slider: 26 pitches, 4 K, 46% whiffs per swing, 31% CSW; putaway pitch carried the finish.
pitch_notes.changeup: 8 pitches, 0 K, 25% CSW; low direct K impact.
pitch_notes.curveball: 7 pitches, 0 K, 43% CSW; useful supporting strike shape.

what_worked: The model correctly prioritized 7+ as the clean threshold instead of overextending into ladders.
Strider cleared the target with 8 strikeouts despite allowing 4 runs and 7 hits.
The fastball-slider core produced all 8 strikeouts.
Positive CLV was captured from -108 entry to later -121 board price.
32% CSW and 32% whiff rate on swings were sufficient to validate the structural K profile.
what_to_monitor: Run prevention/leash volatility remains active when hard contact rises.
First-pitch strike rate was adequate but not elite; high ladders remain anti-burn fades unless early CSW is nuclear.
model_evaluation.patch_recommendation: KEEP Strider threshold profile as actionable when 7+ is below median and price is within threshold. Maintain restriction against 8+/9+ ladders when hard-contact risk is elevated.

notes: This was a disciplined threshold win. Strider hit 8 Ks, clearing the 7+ entry while the model correctly avoided unnecessary ladder exposure. The outing confirms fastball-slider K sustainability even when run prevention is imperfect.
